name: com.apple.globalethernet.managed
title: 802.1X: Global Ethernet
description: The payload that configures the default fallback global Ethernet interface.

payloadkeys.content: Keys relevant to 802.1X configuration. User enrollment payloads don't support the various proxy keys, including `ProxyType`, `ProxyServer`, `ProxyServerPort`, `ProxyUsername`, `ProxyPassword`, `ProxyPACURL` and `ProxyPACFallbackAllowed`.
